# lib/grades

Grade parsing and normalization (YDS, V-scale, French).

## Testing

Tests: `__tests__/lib/grades/parser.test.ts` (Vitest)

Data-driven tables covering grade string parsing, index lookups, and invalid input handling. Run with `npm run test:convex`.
